---
title: "scale_color_marquee"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/stwd/src/branch/main/R/stwd.R#L1710)

# `scale_color_marquee()`

Create a Color Scale with Color-Matched Legend Text

## Usage

```r
scale_color_marquee(values, bold = FALSE, italic = FALSE, ...)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `values` | Named vector of colors (names = category levels). |
| `bold` | Logical, make legend text bold. Default: FALSE. |
| `italic` | Logical, make legend text italic. Default: FALSE. |
| `...` | Additional arguments passed to `scale_color_manual()`. |

## Value

A ggplot2 scale object.

## Description

Creates a `scale_color_manual` where the legend text color matches
the line/point color of each category. Uses marquee for text rendering.
